query: SELECT COUNT(*) as total, SUM(CASE WHEN taxableSales > 0 AND ABS(totalSales - (taxExemptSales + taxableSales)) > 0.02 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as mismatches FROM dailySales WHERE saleDate BETWEEN '2026-03-08' AND '2026-03-16';
